common.student_id_missing: Student id is missing from the URL.
common.student_not_attached: This student is not attached to you. Check that they accepted the invite.
common.student_not_attached_short: This student is not attached to you.

student.title: Pre-session brief
student.subtitle: Snapshot of the student's activity over the last 7 days. The AI brief is a concise Russian narrative for prepping a 1:1.
student.english_mocks_empty: No HR mocks within the window. Suggest running the first one during the session.
student.english_activity_empty: Student has not used Hone English yet (Reading / Listening / vocab). On the session, show how to load materials — hotkey R / L.
student.weak_spots_empty: No atlas nodes with low progress. A good sign — either the student is keeping average above 50, or there's not enough data yet.
student.brief_loading: Preparing the brief (can take up to 30 sec)…
student.ai_empty: LLM chain is temporarily unavailable (or disabled in this environment). The snapshot above is enough to prep.
student.assignments_empty: No assignments sent yet. Fill in the form above and press Push.
student.english_pane_mocks_empty: No HR mocks within the window. On the session — suggest running the first one.
student.no_english_eyebrow: Student does not yet use Hone English
student.no_english_body: On the session show the hotkeys: R (Reading), L (Listening). Load paste/PDF/URL — clicking a word saves it as vocab. Via Reading library on the dashboard you can share materials with all students at once.
student.notes_not_attached: This student is not attached to you.
student.notes_body: For your eyes only — the student does not see these. Markdown supported (headings, lists, **bold**). Auto-save every 1.5 seconds.
student.notes_placeholder:
## 2026-05-04 1:1
- Covered present perfect (current pain — for/since)
- Homework: IELTS task 1, 2 samples
- Asked for a B2-level TED talk

dashboard.tab_overview_hint: Last 30 days of activity + quick actions
dashboard.tab_library_hint: Shared reading material for all students
dashboard.tab_paths_hint: Curated reading paths from atlas nodes
dashboard.title: Tutor dashboard
dashboard.activity_no_data: Not enough data for analytics yet. Create the first event.
dashboard.events_subtitle: Schedule 1-on-1 sessions — the student sees them in Hone Calendar.
dashboard.no_active_students: No active students. Send an invite first.
dashboard.no_owned_circles: You don't own any circles yet. Create one first.
dashboard.field_event_body_placeholder: Optional agenda, prep notes, links to materials…
dashboard.field_meet_url_placeholder: Optional meet link (Zoom / Meet / Telegram voice)
dashboard.events_empty: No events yet. Create the first — it'll show up in the student's Hone Calendar immediately.
dashboard.broadcast_subtitle: Send a single assignment to ALL active students at once — for group classes and shared reading.
dashboard.broadcast_body_placeholder: Optional shared instructions, links, focus questions…
dashboard.broadcast_no_students: You don't have any active students yet. Create and send an invite code in the section above.
dashboard.invite_by_username_hint: If the student is already registered — they'll see the invite right on /profile, no need to copy-paste codes.
dashboard.invite_by_username_success: Done — @{{username}} will see the invite on /profile
dashboard.invites_empty: No invites yet. Create one and send the link to a student.
dashboard.students_empty: No students yet. Create an invite and send it — after Accept the student will show up here.

role_toggle.title: Tutor mode
role_toggle.body: Enables the tutor dashboard with mentees, assignments, sessions and reading paths. No confirmation needed. Free.

step0.title: druz9 — your free toolkit
step0.body: No marketplace and no monetary step here. druz9 is tools for you as a tutor: assignment queue, student snapshot, AI pre-session brief, shared calendar, shared reading library. The platform amplifies your work, it doesn't replace it.

step1.title: Invite codes are the foundation
step1.body: You create an invite — give the code / link to a student. They navigate, register (or sign in) and land in your «My students» list. Until that moment you're not connected — only after Accept.
step1.body_muted: Invite is single-use. You can keep several active at the same time, e.g. one for each incoming student.

item1.label: Push assignment —
item1.body: schedule homework with a deadline; it shows up automatically in the student's Hone TaskBoard. 24h before the deadline they get a notification.

item2.label: Student snapshot —
item2.body: what they did this week: focus seconds, mocks, weak spots, external activity (LeetCode/Coursera).

item3.label: AI brief before the session —
item3.body: summarized into a 1-paragraph «what to talk about today».

item4.label: AI-coach between your sessions —
item4.body: the student can ask the coach 24/7. AI is assistive, it doesn't duplicate your assignments.

step3.title: Create your first invite
step3.body: Generate a code and send it to the student in any convenient way — Telegram, email, WhatsApp.
step3.hint: You can create more invites from the dashboard below.
